c.d: The quantity and variety of movies and TV shows available for streaming on the app
Whether the app requires a paid subscription, offers free content, or a hybrid of both
Ease of discovering, searching, and organizing movies and shows within the app including watchlist and recommendation features
Ability to connect with multiple streaming services and aggregate content into a unified watchlist or library
Special features such as social sharing, live TV, offline viewing, personalization, or access to personal media collection
